/CAL:PLACEMENT REPORT FROM GGRC/DAWT/1370COM/1370REF1/X:DEFENDANT IS COMMITTED TO THE DEPARTMENT OF DEVELOPMENTAL SERVICES PURSUANT TO PC 1370,1, MAXIMUM TERM DOES NOT EXCEED 2 YEARS,/X:DEFENDANT IS COMMITTED TO PORTERVILLE DEVELOPMENTAL CENTER; DEFENDANT DEVELOPMENTALLY DISABLED/COMGG/CPSSCOM//1370MED/X:DEFENDANT HAS BEEN FOUND TO BE A DANGER TO OTHERS/DEFTRET5/1370COM4/

/TWS/X:DURING CASE CONFERENCE, MS, BONNIE CHAN INFORMED TEH COURT THAT MR,FIZULIC WOULD WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA, ON THE RECORD THE DEFENDANT DID NOT MAKE THAT REQUEST BECAUSE HIS ATTORNEY WAS NOT PRESENT/CONTD:STATUS/

/COLT/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE (HD 111 JONES STREET) AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO; NOT TO POSSESS WEAPONS; NOT TOCONSUME ANY ALCOHOL, MARIJUANA; ABIDE BYSTAY AWAY ORDER - 3278 24TH ST, SF,CA 94110 150 YARDS/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATEDPICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:SENTENCE IS CONFIRMED/

/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE INFORMATION TO ADD COUNT, 6, PC45(A)(4), A FELONY, IS GRANTED,/FAWA/IRR/ /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST& CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   6/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 12-13-21/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN COURT NO, 20000091  IS ORDERED AS FOLLOWS:/X:PAY RESTITUTION AND ABIDE BY CPO,/VD:JURY TRIAL/SAORD/SA1:NANCY SANCHEZ (5, 58); MICHALPURZYNSKI (M, 39)/SAORD2/SA2:3278 24TH ST, SF, CA 94110/SAORD3/
